input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.7.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.7.4
            TITLE: any rubber fuel line or hose used must meet the following:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.7.4: Any rubber fuel line or hose used must meet the following:
IC.5.7.4 Any rubber fuel line or hose used must meet the following: 
a. The components over which the hose is clamped must have annular bulb or barbed 
fittings to retain the hose 
b. Clamps specifically designed for fuel lines must be used.  
These clamps have three features: a full 360° wrap, a nut and bolt system for tightening, 
and rolled edges to prevent the clamp cutting into the hose

final_answer: Any rubber fuel line or hose used must meet the following: IC.5.7.4 Any rubber fuel line or hose used must meet the following: a. The components over which the hose is clamped must have annular bulb or barbed fittings to retain the hose b. Clamps specifically designed for fuel lines must be used. These clamps have three features: a full 360° wrap, a nut and bolt system for tightening, and rolled edges to prevent the clamp cutting into the hose
